summary: Ported the iOS AppCore domain layer (counter model, history/aggregation, seed-trust policy, app settings, feedback, and theme) to idiomatic Kotlin under com.codeyam.android.model, with a case-for-case port of the AppCore unit-test suites. Establishes logic parity with the iOS app; no Android UI yet.

changes.title: Counter model, history & JSON persistence
changes.description: CounterModel drives the counter screen's state: select/next-grows-list/previous-wraps, increment/subtract (with allow-negative clamping), reset + undo, add, edit, and delete (blank-in-place within the four base slots, remove-outright beyond them). Per-counter event history records applied deltas, seals a run on reset, caps at 10 runs, and reconstructs a cumulative running-count series. Counter/CounterHistory serialize to/from JSON (via kotlinx-serialization-json, wired into the Gradle build) with a custom decode that supplies missing-field defaults and migrates the legacy single hapticOverride key into both directions.

waysToTest.text: Read android/app/src/test/java/com/codeyam/android/model/CounterModelTest.kt (77 cases covering selection, mutation, delete/blank, undo, history, and persistence).

tests.name: testIncrementRaisesActiveCounter
tests.description: Incrementing raises only the active counter's count.

tests.name: testSubtractClampsWhenNegativesDisallowed
tests.description: With allowNegative false, subtract clamps at zero instead of going negative.

tests.name: testSelectNextPastLastAppendsBlankAndSelectsIt
tests.description: Swiping past the last counter appends a fresh blank slot and selects it.

tests.name: testDeleteBlanksInPlace
tests.description: Deleting a base-slot counter blanks it in place, keeping the row length.

tests.name: testDeleteBeyondFirstFourRemovesAndSelectsPrevious
tests.description: Deleting a counter past the four base slots removes it outright.

tests.name: testHistoryCapDropsOldestRun
tests.description: The per-counter run list caps at 10, dropping the oldest.

tests.name: testCumulativeSeriesReconstructsRunningCount
tests.description: The cumulative-series helper reconstructs the running count over relative time.

tests.name: testUpdateActiveCounterRoundTripsOverrides
tests.description: Per-counter overrides persist across a reload as their rawValue.

tests.name: testLegacySingleHapticOverrideMigratesToBothDirections
tests.description: A legacy single hapticOverride key migrates into both direction overrides on decode.

tests.name: testLegacyCounterWithoutStepDecodesToStepOne
tests.description: A counter persisted before the step field decodes with step defaulting to 1.

changes.title: Seed-trust policy & persistence seam
changes.description: SeedPolicy centralizes whether externally-supplied store state is trusted at launch: debug trusts injected scenario state, release requires the app's own provenance marker (which the model stamps whenever it persists). KeyValueStore is the UserDefaults analog — an interface with an in-memory implementation for tests and a SharedPreferences-backed one for the app, coercing string-injected values like UserDefaults does.

tests.name: testReleasePolicyIgnoresSeededCountersWithoutProvenance
tests.description: Release policy ignores injected counters lacking the provenance marker, using the default starter set.

tests.name: testTrustInjectedPolicyAdoptsSeededCounters
tests.description: Debug (trust-injected) policy adopts seeded counters so captures keep working.

tests.name: testReleasePolicyTrustsOwnPersistedDataAfterStamp
tests.description: Once the app persists (stamping the marker), a release-policy reload trusts its own data.

changes.title: App settings, sound & haptic options
changes.description: AppSettings is the observable store of system-wide defaults (handedness, sound, per-direction increment/decrement haptics) with the same seed-trust gate as CounterModel. SoundOption/HapticOption carry rawValue/label, and HapticOption.resolve migrates the removed amplitude ladder (light/medium/heavy/rigid) to the surviving feels, including legacy single-key migration to both directions.

tests.name: testDefaultsAreRightHandedSilentWithDistinctHaptics
tests.description: A fresh store is right-handed, silent, with the distinct Sharp/Soft default haptic pairing.

tests.name: testLegacyHapticKeyMigratesToBothDirections
tests.description: The pre-split single haptic key migrates to both directions; heavy resolves to sharp.

tests.name: testResolveMigratesRemovedRawValues
tests.description: resolve() migrates removed amplitude values and rejects unknown tokens.

tests.name: testReleasePolicyIgnoresSeededHapticsWithoutProvenance
tests.description: Release policy over an unstamped store ignores injected haptics, using defaults.

tests.name: testPersistsChangesAcrossReload
tests.description: Changing a setting persists it so a reload reads it back.

changes.title: Settings overlay exclusivity
changes.description: SettingsOverlays models the two mutually-exclusive settings panels as one value so the 'never both open' rule lives in one testable place; the toggles enforce exclusivity while closing never reopens the other.

tests.name: testOpeningAppSettingsClosesTheCounterPanel
tests.description: Opening App Settings force-closes the per-counter panel.

tests.name: testTogglingOpenAppSettingsClosesItAndOpensNothing
tests.description: Toggling an open panel closes it without opening the other.

tests.name: testNoToggleEverLeavesBothOpen
tests.description: From any starting state, neither toggle can leave both panels open.

changes.title: Change feedback gating
changes.description: CounterFeedback is the sound/haptic emission seam: NoopCounterFeedback is silent, SystemCounterFeedback owns only the option gating (a non-OFF option fires its injectable emitter) so the model stays free of platform types and unit-testable. Counter.hasFeedbackOverride decides whether the settings feedback section opens.

tests.name: testHapticOnlyFiresHapticWithFeel
tests.description: A non-OFF haptic with sound off fires only the haptic emitter.

tests.name: testBothOffFiresNothing
tests.description: Both options OFF fires nothing.

tests.name: testExplicitOffSoundOverrideReturnsTrue
tests.description: An explicit OFF sound override still counts as a pinned override.

tests.name: testNoOverridesReturnsFalse
tests.description: A counter on pure defaults pins nothing.

changes.title: Theme color tokens
changes.description: CounterTheme is the pure color-token layer: dotHex maps a counter colorKey to its design-token hex (lime fallback for unknowns) and rgbComponents parses a hex string into 0..1 channels, kept free of any Compose Color type so it stays JVM-unit-testable.

tests.name: testDotHexMapsKnownKeys
tests.description: Each known colorKey maps to its design-token hex.

tests.name: testDotHexFallsBackToLimeForUnknownKey
tests.description: An unknown colorKey falls back to the lime accent.

tests.name: testParsesAccentLime
tests.description: The lime accent decomposes into its three 0..1 channels.

tests.name: testToleratesLeadingHash
tests.description: A leading # is tolerated and parses identically.
